narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 2-B (precinct in Huron County) has 642 registered voters, with 65.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
